working_on.task: Cut the 1.15.0 release, update continuity artifacts, and ship host-aware delegation preference as the current stable Forge release

recent_changes: Forge 1.15.0 now restores typed delegation preference on new threads and resolves the same canonical preference across bootstrap, route preview, and runtime routing.
Host capability resolution now separates core default_tier from overlay active_tier, promoting Codex to parallel-workers and correcting Antigravity back to controller-baseline.
Release-facing docs and continuity artifacts now mark 1.15.0 as the current stable Forge release after the canonical repo verification gate passed.
decisions_made: Treat 1.15.0 as stable only when host-aware delegation preference, honest host overlays, and the canonical repo verification gate are all green.
Delegation automation must resolve from typed preference plus host capability and degrade honestly on unsupported hosts instead of leaning on custom_rules prose.
